rootCause.primary: karkunCounter.nextKarkunNum lag behind max kr-* (now 13 vs max 493) caused createKarkun to mint already-occupied IDs

rootCause.tertiary: settings/karkunRequests saved as whole array — approved entries can vanish on later client persist
